commands.name: info
commands.description: Get file metadata and sheet names

commands.name: read
commands.description: Read all data (max 100 rows). Options: --max-rows 0 for all, --range A1:B50 for specific range

commands.name: search
commands.description: Search for data in the file

commands.name: read-cell
commands.description: Read a single cell value (e.g. B3)

commands.name: write-cell
commands.description: Write a value to a single cell

skills.notes: All commands return JSON. Use --range for large files.

commands.name: info
commands.description: Get file info and find placeholders

skills.notes: Use --output to save to a NEW file. Never overwrite the original template. All commands return JSON.

commands.name: send-email
commands.description: Send an email. Optional: --cc, --bcc (comma-separated for multiple)

skills.notes: Outlook must be running. Use send-email instead of UI automation — it is faster and more reliable. All commands return JSON.

discovered.recommendation: Spotify supports: AppleScript wrapper skill, REST API (https://developer.spotify.com/documentation/web-api). Recommended approach: AppleScript wrapper skill.
